name: Fishing Master Kitty
short_description: You will play as a little cat whose dream is to eat every fish in the world! Pick up your fishing rod and grow from a rookie angler into a legendary Fishing Master!
detailed_description:
• Real Fishing Experience, Master Your Angling Art!
    Precisely control the strength and angle to cast your bait to the ideal spot. Engage in a thrilling battle with the fish! The fish's pull varies dynamically—if it exceeds your rod's limit, the fish may escape. But skillful maneuvers (like timely reeling or adjusting position) can turn the tide!

  • Catch fish to advance from "Fishing Novice" to "Fishing Legend"—each stage requires catching specific types and quantities of fish. Alternatively, use your catches to upgrade your gear! Your strategy determines how fast you progress.

  • Freely switch between times to enjoy fishing under the tranquil moonlight, dawn-lit lakes, or shimmering twilight waves.

  • A little black cat accompanies you throughout your fishing journey, ready to help with any problem.

English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
